description_long: This object is a sleek, modern all-in-one desktop computer with a large, flat display framed by a thin, black bezel and a metallic lower chin. The monitor is supported by a sturdy, single-piece, brushed aluminum stand with a triangular profile and a circular cable management hole near the base. In front of the monitor, there is a compact wireless keyboard and a matching wireless mouse, both with a metallic finish that complements the monitor's stand. The rear of the monitor features a smooth metallic surface with a prominent black Apple logo at the center and a row of ports along the lower edge. The overall design is minimalist, with clean lines and a premium metallic sheen. The object exudes a professional and high-end aesthetic, suitable for office or home environments.
description: A modern, all-in-one desktop computer with a large black-framed display, metallic stand, and matching wireless keyboard and mouse. The design is sleek, minimalist, and professional.
description_view_0: Side view showing the ultra-thin profile of the monitor, the angular metallic stand, and the alignment of the keyboard and mouse.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the large black screen, thin bezel, metallic lower chin, and the full keyboard and mouse layout.
description_view_2: Opposite side view highlighting the slimness of the monitor and the geometric stand, with the keyboard and mouse visible from a different angle.
description_view_3: Rear view revealing the metallic back panel, prominent Apple logo, stand with cable management hole, and a row of ports along the bottom edge.
attribute_screen_bezel_design: The bezel is thin, black, and has slightly rounded corners, with a wider metallic chin at the bottom. It appears smooth and contrasts subtly with the display area.
attribute_stand_type: Single-piece, triangular-profile pedestal stand made of brushed aluminum with a circular cable management hole near the base. The stand is rigid and non-adjustable.
attribute_button_placement: No physical buttons are visible on the front, sides, or stand. Any controls are likely minimal and not visible in these views.
attribute_port_visibility: Ports are visible on the lower rear panel, arranged in a horizontal row, but the exact types and number are not clearly distinguishable.
attribute_brand_logo: A black Apple logo is prominently displayed at the center of the rear panel, contrasting with the metallic surface.
